examples: He barnstormed across the southern states in an attempt to woo the voters.
Woo! At 5 in the morning, you were still awake and emailed me.
Do just tell her, miss, that a young fox is here, who would like to woo her.
Hurricane Isabel pounded Hatteras badly in September, so locals are eager to woo business back.
He needs to be a salesman and a preacher to woo consumers, employees and investors.
